sighted_bulletin.title: Magic Dragons are invading! Town Alert!
A Magic Wolf has appeared! Town Alert!

sighted_bulletin2.title: Greater Magic Wolf has appeared! Engage in Battle!

msg1.bulletin_message:
Greetings! I am Klaus, of the North Old Territory. Though I am more well known as the Wolf Wizard.

The Magical Wolf has sensed your Outpost and deemed you to be worthy of a test of courage. Now that the Wolf has dematerialized, I see that you could use some help in defending your lands from other hostile forces. There is a way to become a user of the magic forces, to become a Wizard...

bulletin_message.00:
You have been able to defeat a Magical Wolf this day, and I bring to you an Ancient Wolf Belt. Equipping this, you may learn the ways of becoming a Wizard like myself. However, along with enhanced energy skills comes a volatile force that changes your form into that of a Wolf beast from time to time.

Enjoy your quest for learning and harnessing the magic!
"Elemental Energy, and Shapeshifting," just equip yourself with this gift:

bulletin_message.000:
I sensed a small pack of Magic Dragons in this area. They rarely materialize from an Alternate Plane, and can be aggressive towards all, or become friendly towards another being if they choose it.

Did you happen to see them near your Settlement?

Well, look here, another magical cloud is gathering into a Magic Dragon!
This one here seems friendly. It looks like it wants to stay with you if you are willing to keep it. They can be fierce protectors of their clan, and that would include you now!

I will continue roaming these lands, remember Wizard, to craft and use your Spell books as they grant more attacks.

msg1.bulletin_message:
Your adeptness in Wizardry has attracted a Magical Wolf to your Town.

Once again, you have passed the test of courage. And I have one more Wolf Belt to offer you, so that you may train a Wizard companion if you wish it...

bulletin_message.00:
Everyone has their own inner Wolf form that they can morph into as a Wizard.

Your new Wizard can also choose to use a different spell book attack, for more damage variations.
"Be brave, be strong!" Keep this final gift, and I will continue my journey to other lands, searching for more aspiring candidates...

Wait for another message from me in two days time.

msg1.bulletin_message:
Well wishes to you, Wizard of [str(i18n_data.town_name)]. Your power has grown steadily now, and I'd like to spend a day here. Tell me of your new spells, and I'll tell you of mine!

Wizard, have you heard any strange rumbling noises, lately? An upheaval of the land can sometimes reveal old structures, long buried. Tomorrow, I'll conduct a search.

I will report my findings back to you in a couple days.

bulletin_message.000:
Alas, my journey may end here, amongst these old ruins. The Magical Wolf inside me is struggling to be let loose...

You passed the Wolf's test long ago, but did you ever guess it could have been me?

The conduction of magic for all these years has caught up with me, and I cannot keep its forces under control for much longer.

The price I pay will be my body and mind permanently changed into a monstrous Wolf Beast. Oh, no!

I have protected the lands for so long, but now...
Wizard, you must come here, and put an end to this!

Now, I am changed! Arrghh!
Grrr, Whoever comes near, will be torn to shreds! Beware!

Prepare for a tough battle with the Wolf Beast, and come when ready. You can retreat and return later, if injured badly.

bulletin_message.00:
We have to choose how we wield our magic powers, for they can be used in acts of defense, or as a destructive force.

The Wizard showed us how to live a just life, but one day it all ends. We find an old red spell book on the ground with a note inside.
"Use this spell to alter the Magnitude of your foes, it makes them weaker! - Klaus"

It's up to us now to find our way forward. We receive:

msg1.bulletin_message:
Aha! I knew there was a Wizard over here.

You may call me Cinder, and I may grant you a legendary Wizard hat, far better than you can craft yourself...
That is, if you want to be able to Burn down those monsters that attack you, the Fireball spell is best! And I will make you an enchanted hat with some of my power.

Just craft me up some ingredients, ok?

Hey, are you sure you don't want to get this magic power?
I'll give you one last chance to get me the ingredients!

If you really don't want to, then you can Abandon the quest this last time, and I'll never return.

bulletin_message.00:
Hi Wizard.
"I grant you my powers of fire through this fine hat, as promised."

morphed.description: Flowing power of an Altered Beast!

combo_weather_resist_buff.description: Wearing a Magical Outfit with resistance to environmental temperatures.

morph.description: Allow wolf morphing during battle, for boosted close combat power.

unmorph.description: Remain in original form, for frequent ranged magic power.

ice_spell.description: Ice shards slow down the foe.

bolt_spell.description: Lightning bolts weaken the foe's armor.

magni_spell.description: Magnitude magic changes the foe's size.

dragon_red.description: A severely strong beast on a rampage.

wolfboss.description: The final form of the old Wizard.

input_shelf_wizard_stone_ghost.description: A supply shelf for powder flakes.

ice_book.description: The knowledge of frigid elemental attacks.

bolt_book.description: The knowledge of electrical elemental attacks.

wizard_robe.description: An enhanced Wizard Robe with a leather chestguard.

wizard_morph_toggler.description: Device that can allow or inhibit a Wizard's morph skill.

wizard_staff.description: A long staff with magic gems embedded into the tri-prong.

wizard_shot.description: Magic Missles home in on a target.

level_1_data.hunting_perk_description: A Northern Alliance Wizard is naturally adept at animal tracking, and can hunt animals for food and other resources.

wizard_description.description: The Wizard casts powerful elemental spells, and morphs into a Demi Wolf.

level_1_data.perk_000_description: Magic Missles are conjured and home in on the enemy.

level_2_data.perk_000_description: A slashing attack makes the enemy rage.
level_2_data.perk_001_description: Periodic morphing into a Demi Wolf.

level_3_data.perk_000_description: The Wizard can begin crafting magic goods.

level_4_data.perk_000_description: An attack which creates a thick toxic gas, spreading to all foes in the area.

level_5_data.perk_000_description: Wolf Morphing is mastered and more powerful.

level_6_data.perk_000_description: A great magic attack releasing lava that burns and damages all foes in the zone.

wolf_claws.description: Wolf scratch decreases armor, increases muscle

poison_cloud.description: Health steadily lost from toxic gas

bolt_spell.description: Armor weakened by Wizard Bolt Magic

magni_spell.description: Size changed by Wizard Magic, foe is weakened

wizard_outfit.description: Garment to allow for light quick movements, provides meager protection.

wizard_belt.description: An ancient belt with a Wolf emblem, which grants polymorphing.

wizard_belt_iconic.description: An ancient belt with a Wolf emblem, granting polymorphing.

wizard_wand.description: Dark wood with a metallic striking head, its green jewels can channel magic forces.

wizard_hat.description: A wide brimmed, sturdy hat for Wizards.

wizard_hat_fire.description: Wizard Hat of the Fireball: burns foes.

wizard_hat_fire_iconic.description: Wizard Hat of the Fireball: burns foes.

wizard_workbench_recipe.description: Allows a Wizard to craft new items.
wizard_workbench_recipe.flavor: Built from an old tree stump, with magic crystals emitting their glowing light.

wizard_stone_shelf_recipe.flavor: Can hold 12 pouches of Aquamarine and Amethyst Powder.

morpher_toggle_recipe.description: A tool to have control over the morphing skill.  Grants a command to allow, or inhibit the morph skill.
morpher_toggle_recipe.flavor: Useful to regain the command after being incapacitated.

wizard_hat_recipe.description: A large hat to protect the head.

ice_book_recipe.flavor: Ice magic reduces speed on the target. Wizard can change which spell type is active with the command button.

bolt_book_recipe.flavor: Bolt magic reduces armor on the target. Wizard can change which spell type is active with the command button.

amethyst_flakes_recipe.flavor: Draw out elements from resources and convert into powder.

aquamarine_flakes_recipe.flavor: Draw out elements from resources and convert into powder.

coal_recipe.flavor: I guess this could be made in a firepit instead...

tin_recipe.flavor: Can this be made into a can?
